reason: This configuration aims to maximize performance by addressing the three most critical dataset challenges. We use `weighted_bce` to directly mitigate the severe class imbalance (Finding 1) which disproportionately affects the macro AUC metric. We use `mixup` to synthesize multi-label examples, directly addressing the shift from monophonic focal data to complex soundscapes (Finding 4). Finally, setting `geo=300` provides an aggressive weighting toward the Pantanal wetlands (Finding 5), which is crucial given that the test set is highly localized while the training data is global.
